shared_rules.hatch_consistency: Use the official Hatch mascot reference as the source of truth.

assets.hatch_variant: pointing narrator integrated into story scene
assets.alt: Hatch holding a phone up to a speaker with a song title appearing above it, representing Shazam's core gesture.
assets.caption: Hatch holding a phone up to a speaker with a song title appearing above it, representing Shazam's core gesture.
assets.prompt: Shazam | hero: Hatch mascot (the HackProduct robot with the graduation cap and growth arrow) holding up a phone to an oversized speaker, with a musical note and song title appearing magically above the phone. Expression is delighted and curious. Cream background, no speech bubble. Watermark: "HackProduct" wordmark bottom-right, 60% opacity, JetBrains Mono. Aspect 2400x1350. Use case: illustration-story. Use the official Hatch mascot as a strict character reference, not as a pasted sticker. Preserve Hatch's rounded green head frame, cream face/body, graduation cap, growth arrow, H chest mark, bright eyes, mitten hands, and friendly coach expression. No exact logos, no fake screenshots, no real person likenesses, no implied company endorsement. Do not include a watermark in the generated source because watermarking is applied after approval.
assets.crop_notes: Center-cover crop checked against role safe zone.
qa: Official Hatch reference required by prompt and manifest.
Watermark applied in post-processing.
No exact logos, fake screenshots, real person likenesses, or implied endorsement.

assets.alt: Hatch in a crowd where everyone holds up a phone toward a speaker, highlighting the universal Shazam gesture.
assets.caption: Hatch in a crowd where everyone holds up a phone toward a speaker, highlighting the universal Shazam gesture.
assets.prompt: Shazam | hatch-narrator: Hatch in narrator pose, standing in a crowd scene (a bar or a party) where everyone is holding up their phone toward a speaker. Hatch is pointing at the gesture as if saying "this is the moment." Cream background version of the scene, simplified crowd silhouettes. No speech. Watermark: "HackProduct" bottom-right, 60% opacity, JetBrains Mono. Aspect 1600x1600. Use case: illustration-story. Use the official Hatch mascot as a strict character reference, not as a pasted sticker. Preserve Hatch's rounded green head frame, cream face/body, graduation cap, growth arrow, H chest mark, bright eyes, mitten hands, and friendly coach expression. No exact logos, no fake screenshots, no real person likenesses, no implied company endorsement. Do not include a watermark in the generated source because watermarking is applied after approval.
